questions.content:

sections.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.content:
(21) Students must follow {{BLANK}} to prevent accidents in the lab.
(22) The students have not been using {{BLANK}} while in the lab.
(23) Students cannot eat or drink until {{BLANK}} is finished and they have washed their hands.
(24) Tessa should tie her hair back to avoid danger when she is working with a {{BLANK}} or chemicals.
(25) Students must wear long sleeves and shoes made of {{BLANK}} in the lab.

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Which student is currently using an appropriate notebook?
The tutor says that writing observations in complete sentences
options: A is often not a good use of time
B makes them easier to interpret later
C means that others can understand them
B next to each written section
C next to each drawing and written section

questions.content: Which TWO things must be included in the conclusion to the experiment?
options: B the solutions to the questions
C the students’ own thoughts about the experiment
D the length of time spent on the experiment

sections.instruction: Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: If soil is healthy, it is a {{BLANK}} teeming with life such as worms, fungi and bacteria. If plants are grown in poor soil, they will lack {{BLANK}} and human health will suffer. Plants are nourished by organic matter, {{BLANK}} and other essential elements which are broken down by insects and other organisms in a synergistic relationship.
